pages.title: Wolf
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Wolf donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Recorded anatomy
pages.text: $(rev)Head token only$(warn). No torso/legs means extremely constrained assemblies.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: $(aside)Lone-head previews echo spirits anchored without bodies — pair with foreign limbs deliberately.
